name: Cream Caramels
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread chopped nuts evenly on a buttered, 8-inch square pan.
2. In a saucepan, mix together sugar, Karo syrup, and butter.
3. Stir in only half of the cream until combined.
4. Heat the mixture over low heat, stirring constantly, until it reaches a boil.
5. Continue cooking, stirring frequently, until the mixture thickens and registers 250 degrees on a candy thermometer.
6. Gradually stir in the remaining cream.
7. Remove from heat and pour the caramel over the nuts in the pan.
8. Allow to cool completely, then cut into squares or dip in chocolate for coating.
Makes approximately 5 dozen. Source: Cooked Candies Lesson, 1987
